sigma.title: AWL Bypass with Winrm.vbs and Malicious WsmPty.xsl/WsmTxt.xsl - File
Potential Manage-bde.wsf Abuse To Proxy Execution
Execute Code with Pester.bat as Parent
SyncAppvPublishingServer VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code
Potential Process Execution Proxy Via CL_Invocation.ps1

osquery.name: t1216_002_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1216_002_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;
